display.purpose: Hero headline in the recon canvas title only, one per page.

sub.purpose: In-scene stage names, console page title.

mono.purpose: Endpoint signatures, readouts, anything the pipeline measured.

motion.name: ease-calibrate
motion.purpose: expo.out — default for reveals and settling states; reads as a sensor locking on, never a bounce.

motion.name: ease-scrub
motion.purpose: GSAP ease for scroll-scrubbed timelines tied directly to scroll position (the recon canvas).

motion.name: stagger-reveal
motion.purpose: Per-item stagger inside a revealed list (steps, edge-tiers).

motion.name: duration-preloader-scan
motion.purpose: Preloader scan-bar sweep and point-count tween, run in parallel.

motion.name: duration-preloader-exit
motion.purpose: Preloader curtain exit, expo.inOut, starts at t=1.45s.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid CTA — graphite fill, inverts to Far Indigo on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-solid { display: inline-block; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: 1.5px solid #12151a; background: #12151a; color: #eef0ea; font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 620; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-solid:hover { background: #22307e; border-color: #22307e; } .ds-btn-solid:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22307e; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA — hairline border, inverts to solid graphite on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: 1.5px solid #12151a; color: #12151a; background: transparent; font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 620; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; transition: background 140ms ease, color 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #12151a; color: #eef0ea; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22307e; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Sim-Gate Meter
components.description: Tick-ruled horizontal meter filled to a pass threshold, reads as an oscilloscope trace rather than a progress bar.
components.css: .ds-simgate { position: relative; height: 2.75rem; border: 1.5px solid #cbd1c7; background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 calc(10% - 1px), #cbd1c7 calc(10% - 1px) 10%); } .ds-simgate i { position: absolute; inset: 0 auto 0 0; background: rgba(34,48,126,0.14); border-right: 2px solid #22307e; display: block; height: 100%; }

components.name: Pipeline Step
components.description: A numbered pipeline stage row — the one deliberate numbered sequence in the system; not a pattern to reuse as a generic list style.
components.html:
• 01

    Capture

    Chunked ARCore frames from the companion app.

    POST /capture → scan_id, frame_count
components.css: .ds-step { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 3.25rem 1fr; gap: 0 1rem; padding: 1.35rem 0; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #cbd1c7; list-style: none; } .ds-step__n { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #4a524d; padding-top: 0.35rem; } .ds-step h3 { margin: 0 0 0.35rem; font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 660; font-size: 1.125rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-step p { margin: 0 0 0.6rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #2c3238; } .ds-step code { display: block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #22307e; }

narrative.overview: TwinForge is styled as a survey sheet — the printout an instrument produces, not a marketing page describing one. The palette is lifted directly from a depth sensor's own colormap: far is indigo, mid is teal, near is hot orange. Colour is spent only where the system is actively sensing or computing right now, so it reads as telemetry rather than decoration. Registration marks in the corners, a masthead with live metadata, hairline rules, and monospace figures for anything the machine measured — the page presents itself as an output of the pipeline, not a pitch for it.
keyCharacteristics: A measured colormap, not a brand palette — colour = sensor state, not taste
Flat, hairline-ruled surfaces; a survey sheet has no elevation
One type family (Archivo) doing all the work across its width axis, plus JetBrains Mono for anything measured
Motion reads as instrumentation calibrating, not a marketing entrance

rules.name: The Measured Colour Rule
rules.body: Colour is spent only where the system is sensing or working right now. It never decorates a static element.

rules.name: The Ink-Pair Rule
rules.body: --near and --mid are graphic colours (3:1 floor, large-size only). Any time either hue carries text, swap to its -ink pair.

rules.name: The Instrument, Not Costume Rule
rules.body: No second display face, no serif anywhere. Archivo's width axis is the only lever pulled for hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-Sheet Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow anywhere in the system. Depth comes from hairline rules and background-tint steps, not shadows.

dos: Do spend the hot end of the ramp only on something actually sensing or computing right now.
Do swap to the -ink pair any time a ramp colour sets text smaller than large-scale.
Do keep every bordered surface square-cornered, hairline-ruled, and flat.
Do use Archivo's width/weight axis for hierarchy instead of a second typeface.
Do let prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fully no-op scroll-driven and looping animation.
donts: Don't use a gradient-mesh hero, a cream/pastel palette, or any background-clip: text gradient headline.
Don't add rounded corners, drop shadows, or glassmorphism anywhere.
Don't add a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section or numbered 01/02/03 markers as default scaffolding.
Don't reach for a serif or a second display family 'for warmth'.
Don't use bouncy, elastic, or overshoot easing on any transition.
Don't build an identical icon+heading+text card grid.
